sections.name: Section IA: Multiple Choice
sections.quote: Section IA: Multiple Choice — 15 Questions | 20 Minutes | 10% of Exam Score. Comprises 3 sets of questions based on authentic audio texts.

sections.name: Section IB: Multiple Choice
sections.quote: Section IB: Multiple Choice — 50 Questions | 1 Hour | 40% of Exam Score. Contains 6 sets of 7–10 questions from various readings.

sections.name: Section II: Free Response
sections.quote: Section II: Free Response — 4 Questions | 1 Hour, 40 Minutes | 50% of Exam Score.

parts.name: Short-Answer Questions
parts.quote: Short-Answer Questions: Suggested time: 15 minutes each (~30 minutes)

parts.name: Essay Questions
parts.quote: Essay Questions: Suggested time: 35 minutes each (~70 minutes)
